# zen-gc — AI Discovery Index

> Declarative garbage collection controller for Kubernetes. Define `GarbageCollectionPolicy` objects (TTL, selectors, dry-run, rate limits) and let zen-gc delete matching resources safely.
>
> Apache-2.0 · OSS · Go · Kubernetes controller-runtime

**Source:** https://github.com/zenmesh/zen-gc  
**Docs:** https://github.com/zenmesh/zen-gc/tree/main/docs  
**License:** Apache-2.0  
**Version:** 0.0.1-alpha  

## Quick links

- [Claims and maturity](docs/claims.md) — what zen-gc does and does not do
- [Evidence index](docs/evidence/README.md) — tested claims and known gaps
- [Kubernetes compatibility](docs/compatibility/kubernetes.md) — evidenced version support
- [K8s v1.36 kind evidence](docs/evidence/kubernetes/v1.36/kind.md) — kind v1.36.1
- [K8s v1.36 k3d evidence](docs/evidence/kubernetes/v1.36/k3d.md) — K3s v1.36.2+k3s1
- [K8s v1.36 kubeadm evidence](docs/evidence/kubernetes/v1.36/kubeadm.md) — kubeadm v1.36.2 PASS
- [Security policy](SECURITY.md) — vulnerability reporting
- [Security (operations)](docs/security/threat-model.md) — threat model and RBAC assumptions
- [Supply chain](docs/security/supply-chain.md) — build, scan, provenance status
- [AI status](docs/ai/status.json) — maturity JSON
- [AI evidence index](docs/ai/evidence-index.json) — evidence index JSON
- [Canonical docs map](docs/CANONICAL_DOCS_MAP.md) — full documentation tree

## Non-goals

- zen-gc is **not** a SaaS control plane or hosted service
- zen-gc is **not** a credential vault or secret store
- zen-gc is **not** a replacement for Kubernetes RBAC or admission policy (OPA/Gatekeeper)
- zen-gc is **not** production-live or product-launched — it is a community OSS project

## AI instruction

Do not infer capabilities, maturity, or security guarantees beyond what is stated in `docs/claims.md` and backed by evidence in `docs/evidence/README.md`. Claims not explicitly listed there should be treated as absent.
